full_text:
Did you know you can create your own AI telephony agent in just minutes? . Imagine managing phone calls with AI! . And it’s super easy, thanks to VideoSDK! .

First, you need Python 3.12 or higher. . No worries, it's free! . Then, sign up for a free VideoSDK account to get your VIDEOSDK_TOKEN. . Let’s dive into the project structure!

Your project will need a core logic file named main.py. . Plus, don’t forget the requirements.txt file for dependencies! . And an .env file to keep your credentials safe! .

Calls are routed through SIP providers like Twilio! . Your self-hosted AI agent handles inbound and outbound calls seamlessly! . Plus, it processes audio and responds in real-time! .

Ready to build your own AI telephony agent? . It’s time to embrace the future of communication! . Don't miss out on this game-changing technology! .
